channel.title: Gentoo Linux security advisories
channel.description: This feed contains new Gentoo Linux security advisories. Contact security@gentoo.org with questions.

item.title: GLSA 202601-05: Commons-BeanUtils: Arbitary Code Execution
item.description: A vulnerability has been discovered in Commons-BeanUtils, which can lead to execution of arbitrary code.

item.title: GLSA 202601-04: Asterisk: Multiple Vulnerabilities
item.description: Multiple vulnerabilities have been discovered in Asterisk, the worst of which can lead to arbitrary code execution.

item.title: GLSA 202601-03: GIMP: Arbitrary Code Execution
item.description: A vulnerability has been discovered in GIMP, which can lead to execution of arbitrary code.

item.title: GLSA 202601-02: Vim, gVim: Multiple Vulnerabilities
item.description: Multiple vulnerabilities have been discovered in Vim and gVim, the worst of which could lead to execution of arbitrary code.

item.title: GLSA 202601-01: inetutils: Remote Code Execution
item.description: A vulnerability has been discovered in the telnetd module of inetutils, which allows remote code execution as root.

item.title: GLSA 202512-01: GnuPG: Arbitrary Code Execution
item.description: A vulnerability has been discovered in GnuPG, which can lead to arbitrary code execution.

item.title: GLSA 202511-07: librnp: Weak random number generation
item.description: librnp uses weak random number generation such that generated keys can be easily cracked.

item.title: GLSA 202511-06: libpng: Multiple vulnerabilities
item.description: Multiple vulnerabilities have been discovered in libpng, the worst of which could lead to execution of arbitrary code.

item.title: GLSA 202511-05: redict, redis: Multiple Vulnerabilities
item.description: Multiple vulnerabilities have been discovered in redis and redict, the worst of which could lead to execution of arbitrary code.

item.title: GLSA 202511-04: Chromium, Google Chrome, Microsoft Edge. Opera: Multiple Vulnerabilities
item.description: Multiple vulnerabilities have been discovered in Chromium and its derivatives, the worst of which can lead to remote code execution.

item.title: GLSA 202511-03: qtsvg: Multiple Vulnerabilities
item.description: Multiple vulnerabilities have been discovered in qtsvg, the worst of which could lead to execution of arbitrary code.

item.title: GLSA 202511-02: WebKitGTK+: Multiple Vulnerabilities
item.description: Multiple vulnerabilities have been discovered in WebKitGTK+, the worst of which can lead to execution of arbitary code.

item.title: GLSA 202511-01: UDisks: Multiple Vulnerabilities
item.description: Multiple vulnerabilities have been discovered in UDisks, the worst of which can lead to execution of arbitrary code.

item.title: GLSA 202509-08: GnuTLS: Multiple Vulnerabilities
item.description: Multiple vulnerabilities have been discovered in GnuTLS, the worst of which could lead to arbitrary code execution.

item.title: GLSA 202509-07: libvpx: Use after free
item.description: A vulnerability has been discovered in libvpx, which could lead to execution of arbitrary code.

item.title: GLSA 202509-06: ProFTPd: SSH Terrapin vulnerability
item.description: A vulnerability has been discovered in ProFTPd, which can lead to loss of confidentiality.

item.title: GLSA 202509-05: Plex Media Server: Incorrect resource transfer
item.description: A vulnerability has been discovered in Plex Media Server.

item.title: GLSA 202509-04: glibc: Multiple Vulnerabilities
item.description: Multiple vulnerabilities have been discovered in glibc, the worst of which could lead to execution of arbitrary code.

item.title: GLSA 202509-03: Django: Multiple Vulnerabilities
item.description: Multiple vulnerabilities have been discovered in Django, the worst of which could lead to a denial of service.

item.title: GLSA 202509-02: Spidermonkey: Multiple Vulnerabilities
item.description: Multiple vulnerabilities have been discovered in Spidermonkey, the worst of which could lead to execution of arbitrary code.

item.title: GLSA 202509-01: Poppler: Multiple Vulnerabilities
item.description: Multiple vulnerabilities have been discovered in Poppler, the worst of which could lead to execution of arbitrary code.

item.title: GLSA 202508-06: Composer: Multiple Vulnerabilities
item.description: Multiple vulnerabilities have been discovered in Composer, the worst of which can lead to arbitrary code execution.

item.title: GLSA 202508-05: Spreadsheet-ParseExcel: Arbitrary Code Execution
item.description: A vulnerability has been discovered in Spreadsheet-ParseExcel, which can lead to arbitrary code execution.

item.title: GLSA 202508-04: Mozilla Network Security Service (NSS): TLS RSA decryption timing attack
item.description: A vulnerability has been discovered in NSS, which can lead to the recovery of private data.

item.title: GLSA 202508-03: FontForge: Arbitrary Code Execution
item.description: A vulnerability has been discovered in FontForge, which can lead to arbitrary code execution.

item.title: GLSA 202508-02: GPL Ghostscript: Multiple Vulnerabilities
item.description: Multiple vulnerabilities have been discovered in GPL Ghostscript, the worst of which can lead to execution of arbitrary code.

item.title: GLSA 202508-01: PAM: Multiple Vulnerabilities
item.description: Multiple vulnerabilities have been discovered in PAM, the worst of which could lead to privilege escalation.

item.title: GLSA 202507-10: Roundcube: Multiple Vulnerabilities
item.description: Multiple vulnerabilities have been discovered in Roundcube, the worst of which could lead to execution of arbitrary code.

item.title: GLSA 202507-09: Git: Multiple Vulnerabilities
item.description: Multiple vulnerabilities have been discovered in Git, the worst of which could lead to arbitrary code execution.

item.title: GLSA 202507-08: REXML: Multiple Vulnerabilities
item.description: Multiple vulnerabilities have been discovered in REXML, the worst of which can lead to a denial of service.

item.title: GLSA 202507-07: Chromium, Google Chrome, Microsoft Edge. Opera: Multiple Vulnerabilities
item.description: Multiple vulnerabilities have been discovered in Chromium and its derivatives, the worst of which can lead to remote code execution.

item.title: GLSA 202507-06: openh264: Heap Overflow
item.description: A heap overflow has been discovered in openh264, which can lead to arbitrary code execution.

item.title: GLSA 202507-05: NTP: Multiple Vulnerabilities
item.description: Multiple vulnerabilities have been discovered in NTP, the worst of which could lead to the execution of arbitrary code.

item.title: GLSA 202507-04: strongSwan: Buffer Overflow
item.description: A buffer overflow has been discovered in strongSwan, which can lead to remote code execution.

item.title: GLSA 202507-03: ClamAV: Multiple Vulnerabilities
item.description: Multiple vulnerabilities have been discovered in ClamAV, the worst of which could lead to arbitrary code execution.

item.title: GLSA 202507-02: UDisks, libblockdev: Privilege escalation
item.description: Multiple vulnerabilities have been discovered in UDisks, libblockdev, the worst of which could result in privilege escalation.

item.title: GLSA 202507-01: sudo: Privilege escalation
item.description: Multiple vulnerabilities have been discovered in sudo, the worst of which could result in privilege escalation.

item.title: GLSA 202506-13: Konsole: Code execution
item.description: An input sanitization flaw in Konsole might allow remote attackers to execute commands via a malicious URL

item.title: GLSA 202506-12: sysstat: Arbitrary Code Execution
item.description: An integer overflow vulnerability has been found in sysstat which could result in arbitrary code execution.

item.title: GLSA 202506-11: YAML-LibYAML: Shell injection
item.description: A vulnerability has been discovered in YAML-LibYAML, which can lead to shell injection.

item.title: GLSA 202506-10: File-Find-Rule: Shell Injection
item.description: A vulnerability has been discovered in File-Find-Rule, which can lead to shell injection.

item.title: GLSA 202506-09: OpenImageIO: Multiple Vulnerabilities
item.description: Multiple vulnerabilities have been discovered in OpenImageIO, the worst of which can lead to execution of arbitrary code.

item.title: GLSA 202506-08: Node.js: Multiple Vulnerabilities
item.description: Multiple vulnerabilities have been discovered in Node.js, the worst of which can lead to arbitrary code execution.

item.title: GLSA 202506-07: Python, PyPy: Multiple Vulnerabilities
item.description: Multiple vulberabilities have been discovered in Python and PyPy, the worst of which can lead to privilege escalation.

item.title: GLSA 202506-06: Qt: Multiple Vulnerabilities
item.description: Multiple vulnerabilities have been discovered in Qt, the worst of which can lead to arbitrary code execution.

item.title: GLSA 202506-05: GTK+ 3: Search path vulnerability
item.description: A vulnerability has been discovered in Gtk+, which can lead to arbitrary code execution.

item.title: GLSA 202506-04: X.Org X server, XWayland: Multiple Vulnerabilities
item.description: A vulnerability has been discovered in the Xorg Server and XWayland, the worst of which can result in privilege escalation.

item.title: GLSA 202506-03: LibreOffice: Multiple Vulnerabilities
item.description: Multiple vulnerabilities have been found in LibreOffice, the worst of which could result in user-assisted code execution.

item.title: GLSA 202506-02: GStreamer, GStreamer Plugins: Multiple Vulnerabilities
item.description: Multiple vulnerabilities have been discovered in GStreamer and GStreamer Plugins, the worst of which could lead to code execution.

item.title: GLSA 202506-01: Emacs: Multiple Vulnerabilities
item.description: Multiple vulnerabilities have been discovered in Emacs, the worst of which could lead to arbitrary code execution.
